source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v8 — base-conditional trade-quality overlays
goal: Pivot from full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional overlays (veto, early-cut, hold-extension) that improve the quality of already-selected base trades on BTCUSDT.
global_constraints: Base snapshot active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never retune its logic, thresholds, hours, days, or execution parameters.
Full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features is terminally closed (v4–v7 verdict).
No regression on future PnL. No classifier-transition standalone layer. No raw event / static IV directional ideas.
No feature/label/threshold/architecture selection on lockbox — selection OOS only.
Overlay models train only on trade-level datasets; never on anchor-level surfaces.
All comparisons vs base must be matched: same trade windows, same notionals, strict overlay evaluation.
Labels frozen before training. Thresholds not tuned on lockbox. Purge gap ≥ 24h between windows.
One route at a time: veto first, early-cut only if veto shows signal, extension only if underheld winners found.
Any improvement claim requires matched lockbox OOS comparison vs immutable base.

stages.title: Closure-audit v7 и фиксация инвариантов v8
stages.objective: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 full-surface classification, open the v8 research project, and fix immutable reference + research map axes.
actions: Open a new research_project for v8.
Record v7 terminal verdict via research_record: classification route on full surface terminally failed, reasons for closure, rationale for v8 pivot to trade-quality overlays.
Record immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Define research_map axes: overlay_route, side, feature_family, label_family, model_stage, final_decision.
Create open-items register: trade_surface_atlas, veto_label_contract, veto_long, veto_short, earlycut_route_lock, extension_route_lock, final_overlay_verdict.
success_criteria: v8 research project is open with recorded v7 verdict.
Immutable base reference formally recorded.
Research map axes and open-items register created.

stages.title: Построить trade-surface atlas immutable base
stages.objective: Build the trade-level atlas from the immutable base, transitioning from anchor-level to trade-level thinking, with full entry/exit/path/context records per trade.
actions: Collect all executed trades of immutable base over the full available period.
For each trade record: side, entry/exit timestamps, entry/exit prices, realized PnL, MFE, MAE, time-in-trade, exit reason, weak-window membership, context at entry, path in first 1h/3h/6h.
Build cross-sections: long vs short, winners vs losers, stop-loss vs time-limit vs take-profit, weak quarters, weakest pockets.
Isolate special subsets: worst-decile trades, fragile trades, underheld winners.
success_criteria: Complete trade-level atlas with all required fields populated.
Cross-section analytics produced for long/short, winners/losers, exit reasons.
Worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets identified.

stages.title: Freeze overlay label contracts
stages.objective: Define and freeze all overlay label schemas (veto, early-cut, extension) plus ambiguity policy before any model training begins.
actions: Define veto labels: bad_trade_balanced, bad_trade_conservative — for both long and short sides.
Define early-cut labels: cut_now_balanced, cut_now_conservative.
Define extension labels: extend_hold_balanced, extend_hold_conservative.
Freeze ambiguity policy: handling of near-zero trades, mixed trades, threshold for meaningful material improvement.
success_criteria: All label definitions formally recorded and frozen.
Ambiguity policy documented (near-zero, mixed, material improvement threshold).

stages.title: Feature contract для trade-quality overlays
stages.objective: Author, validate, publish, and materialize new trade-quality custom features (families A–D) on the base trade surface, prioritizing veto-route features first.
actions: Priority 1 — veto features (family A + D): cf_entry_stretch_6h, cf_entry_range_position_12h, cf_entry_exhaustion_score, cf_signal_freshness, cf_confluence_density, cf_trade_eth_btc_confirmation, cf_trade_breadth_confirmation, cf_trade_event_headwind.
Priority 2 — post-entry features (family B): cf_first_1h_followthrough, cf_first_3h_adverse_excursion, cf_first_3h_support_reclaim, cf_post_entry_instability, cf_early_failure_signature.
Priority 3 — exit-time features (family C): cf_mfe_before_time_limit, cf_trend_persistence_at_time_limit, cf_exit_context_strength, cf_reversal_risk_at_time_limit, cf_extension_quality_score.
For each feature: write contract, validate, publish, materialize, verify warmup/coverage/causality.
success_criteria: Priority 1 veto features validated, published, and materialized with acceptable warmup and coverage.
Priority 2 and 3 features published as contracts at minimum.

stages.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces для overlays
stages.objective: Create trade-level time-ordered train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS splits by entry timestamp and assemble modeling surfaces for each side.
actions: Split trades by entry timestamp: train_trades, selection_oos_trades, lockbox_oos_trades.
Assemble surfaces: all_base_trades, long_base_trades, short_base_trades, weak_window_trades (if needed).
Enforce purge gap ≥ 24h between windows.
Record: feature set chosen on selection OOS only, thresholds chosen on selection OOS only.
success_criteria: Frozen train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split with ≥ 24h purge gaps.
Modeling surfaces assembled per side with correct label joins.

stages.title: Veto-route plausibility stage
stages.objective: Train and evaluate veto models (CatBoost, long + short, balanced + conservative) on selection OOS to determine if worst base trades can be reliably identified.
actions: Train CatBoost-veto-short-balanced and CatBoost-veto-short-conservative on short trade surface.
Train CatBoost-veto-long-balanced and CatBoost-veto-long-conservative on long trade surface.
Evaluate on selection OOS: ROC AUC, PR AUC, worst-decile lift, precision in veto bucket, economic effect if top-risk trades removed.
success_criteria: At least one veto model shows PR AUC meaningfully above random on selection OOS.
Economic effect estimate (removing vetoed trades) is positive on selection OOS.

stages.title: Lockbox test for veto overlays
stages.objective: Run the strict matched lockbox OOS comparison — immutable base vs base+veto overlay — to confirm whether veto overlays materially improve the base on unseen data.
actions: Freeze thresholds from best veto models.
Run immutable base on lockbox trades.
Run base + veto overlay on same lockbox trades.
Compute: delta PnL, delta PF, delta DD, trades removed, PnL of removed trades, effect by weak windows.
success_criteria: Matched comparison completed on lockbox with same trade windows and notionals.
Verdict recorded: material improvement confirmed, partial, or failed.

stages.title: Только если veto route показывает signal — открыть early-cut route
stages.objective: Investigate post-entry early-cut overlays only if veto models demonstrated at least weak meaningful signal and bad trades are recognizable in post-entry phase.
actions: Verify veto route gate condition: at least weak meaningful signal on selection OOS.
Train CatBoost-earlycut-long and CatBoost-earlycut-short models.
Evaluate on selection OOS: improvement vs baseline exit, net delta after fees, DD improvement, cut quality (real losers vs future winners).
success_criteria: Gate condition verified before any early-cut training.
Selection OOS metrics show early-cut improves over baseline exit on same trades.
stages.gate_hint: Veto models must show at least weak meaningful signal on selection OOS, and analysis must confirm bad trades are recognizable in post-entry phase.

stages.title: Только если есть evidence of underheld winners — открыть hold-extension route
stages.objective: Investigate hold-extension overlays only if the trade-surface atlas revealed an underheld winner cluster and selection diagnostics suggest extension has a chance.
actions: Verify extension gate condition: underheld winner cluster identified in trade-surface atlas.
Train CatBoost-extend-long and CatBoost-extend-short models.
Evaluate on selection OOS: incremental PnL on extension subset, extension hit rate, DD impact.
success_criteria: Gate condition verified: atlas shows underheld winner cluster.
Selection OOS shows positive incremental PnL without material DD worsening.
stages.gate_hint: Trade-surface atlas must show underheld winner cluster AND selection diagnostics must indicate extension has viable chance.

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и финальный overlay verdict
stages.objective: Compute ownership, cannibalization, and overlap analysis for every surviving overlay route, and deliver the final v8 verdict: overlay success, partial, or failed.
actions: For each surviving overlay route (veto, early-cut, extension): compute ownership, removed-bad-trades count, DD saved, overlap with weak-window clusters.
Determine if improvement is real or cosmetic via matched lockbox comparison.
Record final verdict per route: promote, watchlist, or reject.
Write comprehensive v8 final report with project_id, trade_surface summary, model counts, route verdicts, and next direction.
success_criteria: Ownership and cannibalization analysis complete for all surviving routes.
Final overlay route verdict recorded (success / partial / failed).
Comprehensive v8 final report written via research_record.

warnings: Plan is in Russian; stage titles and objectives preserved in original language for traceability.
Feature families A–D reference custom features that must be authored and published before materialization.
